title: arctium minus subsp. euminus
intro: Arctium minus subsp. euminus, also known as the lesser burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The medicinal properties of Arctium minus subsp. euminus have been associated with various health benefits, including improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
